posts.author: tamzytam (tamara)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Is there a way to automatically include new boards into an existing dashboard to prevent the need to do it manually?

What are you trying to achieve

To prevent manual tasks of adding boards manually to dashboard. Feature for to automatically include all boards in a certain folder etc or even automation.
